businessQuestion: Which product categories incur the highest markdown losses?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DP.CATEGORY,
    SUM(FMC.MARKDOWN_DOLLAR_IMPACT) AS TOTAL_MARKDOWN_LOSS,
    AVG(FMC.MARKDOWN_DEPTH_PCT) AS AVG_MARKDOWN_DEPTH
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_MARKDOWN_CLEARANCE FMC
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
ON FMC.PRODUCT_KEY=DP.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY DP.CATEGORY
ORDER BY TOTAL_MARKDOWN_LOSS DESC;
businessContext: Pricing managers want to identify categories requiring better pricing strategies.
